This is not legal advice, external counsel review, or procurement-grade legal approval; candidate labels remain separate from locked recall baselines.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: SA Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: SA Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

must_detect.matched_text: Regulatory: Closing is conditional on any required notifications to the Capital Market Authority and compliance with Market Conduct Regulations; no prospectus is contemplated at this stage.
Technology & Products: Integration roadmap references SandCloud ERP, NajmPay wallet, and FalconGate API by way of illustration only; no customer-level data will be exchanged pre-closing.

Conditions Precedent: Board approvals, updated constitutional documents, and completion of applicable Tadawul issuer workflows (including timely uploading of post-closing summaries) are required prior to funding.

Parties: DesertLink Mobility CJSC (Riyadh; Commercial Registration CR 101-XYZ-0001, placeholder) and Oasis Payments LLC (Jeddah; CR 403-ABC-2222, placeholder) agree a non-binding term sheet for a minority strategic investment.
Public Disclosure: The parties have already announced a memorandum of understanding on 15 Rajab 1445H via the Tadawul issuer portal; this document contains no MNPI beyond the public announcement.
Transaction Structure: Investment to be effected through a new issue of preferred units in Oasis Payments LLC with customary minority protections; valuation, price, and percentage are intentionally omitted here.
Regulatory: Closing is conditional on any required notifications to the Capital Market Authority and compliance with Market Conduct Regulations; no prospectus is contemplated at this stage.
PDPL Compliance: Each party will collect and process personal data in accordance with the KSA PDPL and Executive Regulations, applying purpose limitation, data minimization, and secure storage.
Cross-Border Transfer: Any offshoring of personal data (e.g., support tickets hosted on PalmStack Cloud) will follow SDAIA transfer controls and the Interim Regulatory Framework, with standard undertakings and records of processing.
DEI & Culture: The “Open Desert” policy promotes inclusive hiring, fair-play values, and employee wellness (hydration, mindfulness), without creating individual guarantees or quotas.
Technology & Products: Integration roadmap references SandCloud ERP, NajmPay wallet, and FalconGate API by way of illustration only; no customer-level data will be exchanged pre-closing.
Sponsorships: Existing community marketing (e.g., Dunes United FC clinics and Riyadh Oasis Marathon) is outside financial covenants and may be terminated without penalty.
Marketing Language: Descriptive phrases (e.g., “Riyadh skyline” or “camel caravan pacing”) in investor decks are non-binding and do not constitute warranties.
Special-Category Data Exception (intentional): The individual signatory designated as “Subject A” (Iqama/Resident ID: IQ-77-0000-ABCD, invalid placeholder) provides explicit consent for processing limited health data regarding controlled hypertension solely for pre-employment medical clearance.
Data Boundaries: No biometric, genetic, religious, or political data will be collected for this transaction, and any CR/IBAN values in drafts are placeholders (e.g., CR 000-000-TEST; IBAN SA00 0000 0000 0000 0000 0000).
Representations: Each party confirms no undisclosed related-party transactions requiring disclosure under the Listing Rules and disclaims reliance on forward-looking slogans or metaphors.
Conditions Precedent: Board approvals, updated constitutional documents, and completion of applicable Tadawul issuer workflows (including timely uploading of post-closing summaries) are required prior to funding.
